headline: While Amazon, Microsoft, Google Struggle With AI On Land — China Looks To The Sea
summary: The AI race is running into an unexpected wall—and it's not chips or capital. It's water, power, and local resistance. As Amazon.com, Inc., Microsoft Corporation, and Alphabet Inc. push to expand data center capacity, investors are starting to question whether the physical footprint of AI is becoming the real constraint. AI Growth Meets Real-World Limits According to a Reuters report, multiple hyperscalers have already scrapped or delayed billion-dollar data center projects in the U.S. amid comm

headline: Swedish Court Reschedules Delivery of Judgment in PriceRunner vs Google Antitrust Case
summary: STOCKHOLM, April 10, 2026--Klarna Group plc (NYSE: KLAR) wishes to update investors that the Patent and Market Court in Stockholm, Sweden (Patent- och marknadsdomstolen) has postponed delivery of its judgment in the antitrust damages proceedings brought by PriceRunner, a Klarna subsidiary, against Google.

content.title: Swedish Court Reschedules Delivery of Judgment in PriceRunner vs Google Antitrust Case
content.summary: STOCKHOLM, April 10, 2026--Klarna Group plc (NYSE: KLAR) wishes to update investors that the Patent and Market Court in Stockholm, Sweden (Patent- och marknadsdomstolen) has postponed delivery of its judgment in the antitrust damages proceedings brought by PriceRunner, a Klarna subsidiary, against Google.

headline: Why Hut 8 (HUT) Is Up 31.8% After Google AI Deal And $10 Billion Data Center Plan
summary: In early April 2026, Hut 8’s pivot toward large-scale AI and compute infrastructure gained momentum as it advanced the US$10.00 billion, 245 MW River Bend data center and secured a 15-year leasing deal with Google that could reach up to US$17.70 billion in revenue if all renewal options are exercised. At the same time, easing geopolitical tensions and a partial recovery in cryptocurrency markets have improved sentiment toward Hut 8’s hybrid Bitcoin mining and AI infrastructure model,...

headline: Cloud AI Today - Enhancing AI: ASF Launches Responsible AI Initiative
summary: The Apache Software Foundation (ASF) has launched a Responsible AI Initiative to enhance the open-source technologies essential for modern AI systems. This initiative, aiming for a $10 million funding goal, begins with donations from Anthropic and Alpha-Omega. It focuses on strengthening the infrastructure that supports AI, ensuring security, transparency, and responsible governance of ASF projects. The initiative also seeks to expand community engagement with learning and collaboration...

It focuses on strengthening the infrastructure that supports AI, ensuring security, transparency, and responsible governance of ASF projects. headline: Broadcom Higher Amid Alphabet Partnership After Earnings Beat
summary: Broadcom  flashed a death cross recently but its outlook is brightening after the stock soared past its 50-day moving average in recent days amid news of a partnership with Google parent Alphabet.  On Tuesday, the artificial intelligence chip leader revealed a new partnership with Alphabet to make tensor processing units.  Now, Broadcom stock is making its way toward a buy point of 414.61 in a consolidation base, according to Investor's Business Daily's MarketSurge.

content.title: Broadcom Higher Amid Alphabet Partnership After Earnings Beat
content.summary: Broadcom  flashed a death cross recently but its outlook is brightening after the stock soared past its 50-day moving average in recent days amid news of a partnership with Google parent Alphabet.  On Tuesday, the artificial intelligence chip leader revealed a new partnership with Alphabet to make tensor processing units.  Now, Broadcom stock is making its way toward a buy point of 414.61 in a consolidation base, according to Investor's Business Daily's MarketSurge.

headline: Intel, Sandisk and Other Big Winners in the S&P 500’s Hot Streak
summary: The  may be on a hot streak but some of its stocks are absolutely on fire.  The index has climbed for seven consecutive days through Thursday’s close—up 7.6% over that period—its longest winning streak since October.  The semiconductor company’s shares are also up for seven consecutive days.
